/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/test_main.c.o "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/cluster/cluster_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-master-esp32p4/vfs_bridge/cluster_host_vfs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mesh/cluster/cluster.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mesh/envelope/mesh_protocal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mini9p/mini9p_client.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cluster_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mini9p/mini9p_protocol.c.o" -o cluster_vfs_test
